0.text: Prominent centriacinar and paraseptal emphysema in the upper lobes of both lungs

1.text: Emphysematous changes in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

2.text: Ground-glass opacities around areas of emphysema in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

3.text: Ground-glass opacities minimally observed in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

4.text: Increased pleuroparenchymal densities in the lingular segment of the left lung

5.text: Subpleural nodules in the middle lobe of the right lung, largest measuring 3-4 mm
